_comment: Real Intuit certification badge artwork ONLY — no stand-ins (honesty discipline). Files live in src/assets/img/brand/badges/. The partials/intuit-badges.njk component renders this array, so it shows only the artwork actually present. PENDING (founder to drop the real artwork into the badges/ folder, then add an entry here): QuickBooks Online Level 1, QuickBooks Online Level 2, Bookkeeping. They exceeded the DesignSync get_file cap, so they need to be added on the founder's machine.

intuit.alt: Intuit Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor — Gold tier
